title: cirsium × nevoleanum
intro: Cirsium × nevoleanum, also known as the Nevole thistle, is a hybrid species of thistle that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cirsium × nevoleanum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Cirsium × nevoleanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
